title: CGC Earnings History and Market Analysis
text: Canopy Growth has a long earnings history spanning multiple years of results and market performance. The company's earnings trajectory has shown significant transformation from losses to improving metrics. Recent earnings data shows CGC missed EPS expectations by 292.16% while beating revenue expectations by 2.99% in Q3 FY2026. More specifically, Canopy Growth reported revenue of $74.5M and EPS of $-0.18 in Q3 FY2026. The cannabis market continues to evolve with regulatory changes and competitive dynamics shaping earnings potential.
